snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 03 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th Feb 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 03 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th Feb 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

#Colors0fHappiness

snippet.title: Lut Gaye (Full Song) Emraan Hashmi, Yukti | Jubin N, Tanishk B, Manoj M | Bhushan K | Radhika-Vinay
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's Lut Gaye; a romantic ballad composed by Tanishk Bagchi, penned by Manoj Muntashir and sung by Jubin Nautiyal featuring Emraan Hashmi, and Yukti Thareja. The video is directed by Radhika Rao and Vinay Sapru.

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin – Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

snippet.title: Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6
snippet.description:
Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6

Groove with us to the official HBL PSL 6 anthem as we celebrate the moments of finesse that one finds in the heart of every cricket match. 

This year’s anthem also reflects the realities of COVID-19. As a number of fans will be watching Pakistan’s biggest sporting event remotely, the anthem cheers on players on the field and their fans at home to celebrate their groove!

The anthem is a celebration of Pakistan’s musical diversity as Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig and Young Stunners come together to sing the HBL PSL anthem for the first time ever. The mix of artists is particularly exciting as it represents artists from opposite ends of Pakistan’s musical spectrum. The anthem brings together voices from Pakistan’s rich musical landscape: regional folk and urban sounds of pop and hip-hop.

Music Produced by Xulfi
Agency: Giraffe Pakistan
Composed by Xulfi and Adnan Dhool
Lyrics: Adnan Dhool, Young Stunners (Talha Younus, Talha Anjum)
Associate Music Producer: Bilal Haider
Executive Producer: Muhammad Ibrahim
Operations Manager: Saad Mansoor
Vocals: Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig, Young Stunners 
Recorded and Mixed by Xulfi @ Xth Harmonic
Mastered by Chris Gehringer @ Sterling Sound, Edgewater NJ.
Production House: Seeme Production 
Executive Producer: Shehzad Ahmed 
Producer: Madiha Majeed 
Director: Fida Moin
DOP: Zain Haleem 
Post Producer: Faisal Shaikh 
Edit: Ahsan Raza 
Grade: Tahir Moosa 
Post and animation: Owais Roy, Post Island

Pakistan Super League is a franchise T20 cricket tournament organized by the Pakistan Cricket Board. Top international and local cricketers represent five cities of Pakistan.

Ali Ya Ali Haider Haider

snippet.title: 100 खाद्य परतें चुनौती #2 Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
हम जानते हैं, हम जानते हैं, आप भोजन से जुड़ी चुनौतियों से पूरी तरह से प्यार करते हैं और आज हम आपको कुछ ऐसी चीजें प्रदान कर रहे हैं जो आपको और भी अधिक स्वादिष्ट लगेंगी, भोजन की 100 परतें!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

localized.title: 100 खाद्य परतें चुनौती #2 Multi DO Challenge
localized.description:
हम जानते हैं, हम जानते हैं, आप भोजन से जुड़ी चुनौतियों से पूरी तरह से प्यार करते हैं और आज हम आपको कुछ ऐसी चीजें प्रदान कर रहे हैं जो आपको और भी अधिक स्वादिष्ट लगेंगी, भोजन की 100 परतें!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!

snippet.title: लेटेस्ट नई रिलीज़ मूवी " यौद्धा "हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में |भारत,मीरा स्टोरी दर्शन
snippet.description:
Watch this Bollywood Hindi Action Movie "Nepali The Warrior" (dubbed from Tamil Superhit film "Nepali") starring Bharat, Meera Jasmine, Govind Namdeo. 

Synopsis-
The movie revolves around Karthik (Bharath), a software engineer. He comes across Priya (Meera Jasmine) in a hill station. After formal acquaintance, love blossoms between them.
As usual, the girl family protests their affair. Eventually, the couple walks out of the house and get married. They face trouble in the form of a greedy and sexual maniac police officer. He lusts on Priya. When he tries to molest her, she gets killed. The blame falls on Karthik.
He kills the police officer and goes to jail, where he meets a Nepali social worker (Govind Namdeo), who voices for women harassed in the workplace. Inspired by the Nepali, Karthik comes out of the prison to punish those who misbehave with women at the workplace. He bumps off a computer engineer, a professor and a doctor dressed as a Nepali youth.
DCP Gautham (Prem) takes up the task of cracking the serial murders. Does he manage to pin down Karthik forms the crux?
tags: new release south dubbed hit movie

snippet.title: Pehli Si Muhabbat Episode 6- Presented by Pantene [Subtitle Eng] - 27th Feb 2021 - ARY Digital Drama

snippet.title: MAZAA | B Praak | Jaani | Arvindr K | New Hindi Songs 2021 |Gurmeet | Hansika | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
"There is no love without forgiveness and there is no forgiveness without love"

"Mazaa" is a song about confession, love, betrayal, regret, and forgiveness from beloved... 

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

Audio Credits:
Singer& Music By: B Praak
Lyricist & Composer: Jaani 
Video: Arvinder Khaira 
Presentation by: Dilraj Nandha 

Team:- 
Creative director:- Amrinder Singh 
Music Themes Designed By B Praak
Arranged&Programmed By Kartik dev Gaurav Dev 
Flute By Paras Nath
Violin By Manas 
Mix&Mastered By Gurjinder&Akash
B Praak Costume by: Mayurkataria
Assistant Director: Satnam Singh, Jais Sivia, Sukhman Singh
Production by: Third eye films (Faheem Rahiman) Dubai

Hansika Motwani Team:  
Hairstylist: Savita Dnyanoba Sankpal 
Makeup Artist: Reshma Merchant 
Costume: Pranab Sood
BTS team: Paul Davidson 

Gurmeet Choudhary Team
Makeup: Sangeeta Rawal 
Makeup Assitant: Rasika Shinde 
Hair: Asir Sayeed (team HAKIM AALIM )
Costume: Yash Badheka
Manager: Vasudha Grover ( TOABH ENTERTAINMENT)
Driver: Pintu Yaadav 
Personal assistant: Pintu yaadav


Line production - Vikrant kaushik, Adesh Gola, Arun Paharia 
Mumbai Production - Anuj Tiwari
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 

#BPraak
#Mazaa
#Jaani 
#ArvindrKhaira 
#SaregamaMusic

Lyrics:
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Baho Mein So ke, Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Also, listen to the song on:

JioSaavn: http://bit.ly/37EnmVG
Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/t8jBiqRa2
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/2P4qXWA
Hungama: http://bit.ly/3uq0pPx

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 309 - Full Episode - 26th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 309: Vivan Became Unconscious
--------------------------------------------------------
Vivan became unconscious of the unknown Villen is trying to take all power of Vivan. Baalveer and Ananya successfully started the airplane and they are all set to leave the island. watch the full episode now.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: Lavanya Tripathi New Released Full Hindi Dubbed | South Indian Movie Dubbed in Hindi Full Movie 2021
snippet.description:
The film starts with the death of a renowned neurologist named Pramodh (R. Amarendran). His gym trainer Dheena (Sai Dheena) is seen paying respects at the funeral before leaving. The plot then shifts to a young crime inspector named Kumaran (Sundeep Kishan), who is chasing a petty thief and witnesses Dheena murdering his wife. Kumaran chases Dheena, who corners him and halts him with a blow to his head. In an ensuing tussle, Kumaran manages to kill Dheena.

A meeting with psychiatrist Aadhirai (Lavanya Tripathi) ends on a rough note when she deems him medically unfit to rejoin the police force. Later, when he faces symptoms which attribute to PTSD, he mends his ways with Aadhirai, who helps him overcome his disorder. A second murder happens in which a famous actress, Vishma (Akshara Gowda) is killed. Kumaran visits the spot and gets stressed and shocked upon finding the similar blood stains from the earlier murder and the same brand of cigarette smoked by the murderer. Aadhirai finds him, treats him for his PTSD, and makes him normal. Kumaran meets with Rudhran (Daniel Balaji) and introduces Aadhirai to him as a motivational speaker. Kumaran, now fitter, sets out his investigation and finds that a makeup man named Gopi (Mime Gopi) must have done the murder as he is the prime suspect. Upon investigation, he gets to know that Gopi and Dheena showed a totally different behavior a few days before they committed the murders. Kumaran tracks down Gopi, but he jumps to his death before confessing anything.

Subscribe Us - http://goo.gl/vmw18Y

Like Us on FB - https://www.facebook.com/wamindiamovies

G+ - https://plus.google.com/+WAMIndiaMovies

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3114 - Full Episode - 3rd March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3114: 
-----------------------
Everyone is all set to go for the land deal but Jethalal is still against selling his ancestor's land. Jethalal asks Champaklal to not sell the land but Champaklal says this is to only option left. So to save his ancestor's land Jethalal runs away with land's papers. Iyer asks Jethalal that if he won't sell the land then how will he be able to deliver the 100 tabs. Can Jethalal Save His Ancestor's Land? Who will Jethalal Deliver the 100 Tabs? Catch the fun and watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present

snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Goli Maar De sung by Asees Kaur ft. Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar.

Stream full song here

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/goli-maar-de-2
JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Goli-Maar-De/Goli-Maar-De/AyYeUzppYAA?referrer=svn_source=share&svn_medium=com.whatsapp&utm_source=share&utm_medium=com.whatsapp

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/album/goli-maar-de/bl_3616553446935

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJdh3uT9/
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645



Singer - Asees Kaur
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Vicky Sandhu
Composition- Vicky Sandhu
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal

Featuring - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Rav Dhillon 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Yuvraj Indori
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
chorographer - John 
Production - Kuldeep 
Editing - Zipsi 
Colour - Onkar
Stylist - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Lyrics :

Karda rehnda a ignore ve 
Tere moohre chalda ni zor ve 
Shelian to rakhdi lukake tenu main 
Mere bina takki na koi hor ve 
Kolo d mukh fer langde eh hunde ni Asool pyar de 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Jini vaari tere vall Dekha sohnya 
Tera ta dhyan mere vall howe na
Odo tk tenu kuj feel hunda na 
Jado tak tere moohre kuri rowe na 
Tu Khijea Rehna a roz ve 
Kde hass meri Jind thaarde 
J sade vall Takna ..
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Matchinga main Kardi a Jaan jaan Ke 
Jaan bujh Notice tu Krda e nai 
Mere bina rehna a tu bada  khush ve 
Tere bina Pal Mera sarda e nai 
Vicky Sandhu Main Chaluni apni Band Kar tere gere bahar de .. 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde.


#GoliMaarDe #RohitZinjurke #NitaShilimkar

Sira e hou
Sira e hou
Sira e hou

Desi Crew… Desi Crew… Desi Crew… Desi Crew…

Mukhde to pauga bhlekha chann da
Jani khani utte nahio dil mannda
Mukhde to pauga bhlekha chann da
Jani khani utte nahio dil mannda

Ho paugi kahrood jo
Jatti ni barood jo
Nira e hou nira e hou

Ho turru jehdi taur ni
Patt dungi shor ni
Chhada ju 12 bor ni
Ho sira e hou sira e hou
Jatti sira e hou

Ho paune 6 k foot jatta meri height ve
Methon puchhan saheliyan jo lawaan diet ve
Main vi bahuteyan friend’a ch believe naa karan
Mere pichhe chobbran ch hundi fight ve

Jo khadu mere pakh ch
Garoor jihdi akh ch
Nira e hou nira e hou

Main vekhun mud mud ke
Rahun naal jud ke
Te paaun chitte kurte
Sira e hou sira e hou
Jatt sira e hou

Ho maahdi moti gall nahio jaan vaardi
Ho gaya main talli phadu chabi car di
Limit ni kardi cross kade oh
Family joint hou meri naar di

Ho kahi ni main mod’da
Dil ni main tod’da
Pikka lai doon Ford da
Sira e hou sira e hou

Ho goneaane aaugi
Vekhi kivein chhaugi
Suit jadon paaugi
Sira e hou ohdon sira e hou

Suit karaan order maim online ve
Akh nakk lakk mere tinne fine ve
Surajan naan mera kithe aa mukabala
Mukh mera eddan karda ae shine ve

Ho paina jadon hass main
10 bata 10 main
Sira e hou sira e hou

Maana tere naal ve
Zindagi kamaal ve
Ghair dena thaal ve
Sira e hou sira e hou
Utton sira e hou

Ho poora maan taan oh deyun Maan nu
Khad ke Bhatinda dekhuga rakaan nu
Jehde mere yaar mainu rehn chhed’de
Den’ge wadhaiyan gabbru jawan nu

Hmm dohein same same ji
Jatti naale mem ji
Pau jehdi game ji
Sira e hou sira he hou

Ho pakki laa doon mohar jo
Sulfe di lor jo
Gussa deyu thor jo
Sira e hou sira e hou
Jatti sira e hou

Mere naal khad ke
Zindagi se varke
Naal naal padh ke
Sira e hou jatta sira e hou

Sira e hou sira e hou
Sira e hou

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te

Mere geet utte ne sharabi nachde
Khadki jande ne ni glass kach de
Khadke de vicho mennu saaj sunn de
Saaja' vicho' kann teri vaaj sunn de
Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

snippet.title: Pakistan में Wing Commander Abhinandan Varthaman को इस जगह पकड़ा गया था (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
भारतीय वायु सेना के विंग कमांडर अभिनंदन वर्तमान जिनका विमान पाकिस्तान के एक गांव क्रैश हुआ था, और वो गिरफ़्तार कर लिए गए थे. इस पूरे घटनाक्रम को एक साल बीत गया है. लेकिन जिन लोगों ने अभिनंदन को पकड़ा था, उन्हें एक-एक बात याद है. नियंत्रण रेखा पर बसे पाकिस्तान के होर्रान गांव से बीबीसी संवाददाता शुमाइला जाफरी की रिपोर्ट.

#Pakistan #AbhinandanVarthaman #BalakotStrike

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

snippet.title: Kosovo: Newest Independent Islamic Country in Europe, India's reaction on declaration | Najam Bajwa
snippet.description:
Kosovo: Marks 13th Independence Day, A New European Nation-State? The most youngest Islamic country in the world. Serbia continues to see Kosovo as its own territory, despite recognition of its independence by over 117 countries. Kosovo is a Newest Independent Islamic Country in Europe. India's reaction on declaration India's reaction to the 2008 Kosovo declaration of independence. Understand with Maps explanation by Najam Ul Hassan Bajwa.
#Kosovo
#Youngest_Country
#European_Nation

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo▶ ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

JioSaavn   http://bit.ly/3awVcgU

Je mann’na ae tan mann ja ve

Ladna tan andar ladna
Karke nabede rakhi ve

Teri raat kithe aa langdi ve
Jina tera kardi ohton adha hi aa mangdi ve

snippet.title: Mystery Of The Infants | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Many people in a society chase a man. The man then goes inside one of the houses and picks up a baby. When the people get their hands on the man, they start hitting him. Two women identify the baby and Bhavish and Jyoti's daughter. When they go to their house, they are shocked to find both of them dead and the CID team is approached for further investigation. Who killed the couple? Watch this episode to find out.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3112 - Full Episode - 1st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3112: 
-----------------------
After Jethalal informs everyone about the good news from Sundar, everyone goes to sleep. Later on, while Jethalal is sleeping, his grandfather, Jayantilal, comes into his dreams and warns him of the danger that lies ahead.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links

snippet.description:
Ali Pasand Hai Mujhe - 13 Rajab New Manqabat 2021 | Syed Raza Abbas Zaidi | Mola Ali Manqabat | 1442

Recited By | Syed Raza Abbas Zaidi

Releasing Date | 12 Rajab Ul Murajab 
-----------------------------------------------
New Manqabat By Syed Raza Abbas Zaidi | A very Precious gift for all Momineen on the Auspicious Occasion
of 13 Rajab Birthday of Hazrat Imam Ali a.s 
-----------------------------------------------
#AliPasandHaiMujhe #SyedRazaAbbasZaid #13RajabNewManqabat2021 
----------------------------------------------
Manqabat Lyrics 
-----------------------------------------

دم ھمادم علی علی علی مولا
دم ھمادم علی علی علی مولا

حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر

جلالِ ذالجلال ھے علی علی
خدا کا ھم خیال ھےعلی علی
بلندیاں یہ  دیکھکر  پکارا دل میرا

علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

رجب کی تیرھویں کو یہ بتوں سےکعبہ بول اُٹھا
چلو یہاں سے جاؤ  اب  تھا  جتنا رہنا  رہ  لیا
خدا کاھے  یہ  فیصلہ علی علی
 ھے جسکا  گھر وہ آگیا علی علی
نہیں پسند مجھکو  تم  مجھے  تو  بس  میرا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

مناؤ جشن یہ کہا  خدا نے  خود  خدائی  سے
ملے ہیں آج مصطفٰےؐ زمیں پہ اپنے بھائی سے
نبیؑ کی گود میں علیؑ علی علی
 جب آئے  تو  نظر  ملی علی علی
علیؑ  جو   مسکرائے  تو  یہ   بولے    مصطفٰےؐ 
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

نہ جانےکتنےلوگ تھےجو سوسکے نہ رات بھر
تھے  منتظر   بتولؑ  کا  بنے  گا  کون   ھمسفر
ستارا  عرش  سے   چلا علی علی
لئے   رضائے  فاطمہؑ علی علی
علیؑ   کے  در   پہ   آکے  یہ  ستارا  بول   اُٹھا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

مجھے پسند نہیں ھے کسی کی بات کرو
خدا کے بعد خدا کے ولی کی بات کرو
فرشتوں قبر میں کیسے سوال کیسے جواب
اب آگئے ھو تو بیٹھو علی کی بات کرو

لئے کتاب ھاتھ  میں ھر  اک  حساب   مانگنے
فرشتے  قبر  میں  جب  آگئے  جواب   مانگنے
میں مطمئن تھاساتھ علی علی
 ہیں میرےلئےنجات ہیں علی علی
فرشتے کچھ نا کہسکے  یہ میں نے  جب  کہا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

یہ  دے  رھا   تھا   دار   پر   بیان   میثمِ  ولا
علیؑ کا عشق ساتھ ھے تو جان کیا  زبان  کیا
ھے  حد میرے جنون کی علی علی
نا روک پائیگا کوئی علی علی
تو  جتنی  بار  پوچھ  لے  کہونگا   میں  سدا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر 

خیبر میں جب علیؑ کو محمدؐ نے دی صدا
سنکر  صدا  علیؑ  نے  یہ  راہوار   سے  کہا
چل اے مجلی ھمکو  بلاتے  ہیں  مصطفٰیؐ
ایسے   پہنچ  کے   تیری   مقلد   بنے   ھوا
دوڑا  وہ   اسطرح  کے   ھوا  کانپنے   لگی
کہتا  تھا  ھر  قدم   پہ  مجلی  علیؑ  علیؑ
علیؑ  علیؑ علیؑ  علیؑ

آئینگے کسطرح سے علی بس یہ سوچ کر
خیبر میں سبکے لب پہ رواں تھا اگر مگر
نظریں جمی ہوئیں تھیں مدینے کی راہ پر
کہنے   لگے   یہ حضرتِ   سلمان  دیکھکر
کیوں دیکھتے ھو راہ تم اتنے دھیان  سے
وہ  دیکھو  آرھے  ھیں  علیؑ  آسمان  سے

واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی

پہنچے  علیؑ   سلام   نبیؐ   کو   کیا   ادا   
پرچم  دیا  نبیؐ   نے  چلا    شیرِ     کبریا
مرحب کو اسطرح سے پچھاڑا نہ اُٹھسکا
ھر  سمت  وردِ   نامِ   علیؑ   گونجنے  لگا
خیبر کا در اُکھاڑکے پھینکا علیؑ نے  جب
کہنے لگے یہ دیکھکے عاشق علیؑ کے سب
 
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی

من کنت مولا فہٰذا علی مولا 
من کنت مولا فہٰذا علی مولا 

علیؑ کا ھاتھ تھام کر نبیؐ نے خم میں  یہ کہا
بغور دیکھلیں سبھی یہی ھے  جانشیں  میرا
کہا  یہ جب رسول نے علی علی
ہیں سبکے مولاؑ آج سے علی علی
تو  جھوم  کر  ھر  عاشقِ  علیؑ  نے  دی  صدا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

ذیشان ھو یا رضا ھو سب ہیں تیرے درکے نوکر (مولا)
شاہ شمس سچل بھٹائی خواجہ ہوں یا ہوں قلندر
ملا ھے سبکو مرتبہ یہ سب ھے بس کرم تیرا
وہی بنا  ولی   کے  جسکے  لب  پہ   ورد  تھا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

snippet.description:
#BattleInStyle #FreeFire #YoungStunners #TalhaAnjum #TalhahYunus #RapDemon

Battle In Style - @Garena Free Fire Pakistan 
Written/Performed by @Talha Anjum @Talhah Yunus @Rap Demon 
Music/Mix/Master: @Jokhay 

We received over 2000 entries for the RAP competition, out of which over 200 entries made it to our web-event and got featured on our website. Out of these, only 6 made it to the final round with a chance to win PKR 800,000! 

Watch the video till the end to see which 6 Battle in Style RAP entries made it to the final round! 

Next, the 6 finalists will be flown into Karachi where they will record their new songs that will then be published here, on our official Garena Free Fire Pakistan YouTube channel.

snippet.title: To Be Honest 2.0 | Syed Mustafa Kamal | Tabish Hashmi | Full Episode | Nashpati Prime

snippet.title: KIA nai invite kiya | Mooroo | VLOG
snippet.description:
So they just announced the prices for the KIA Sorento. 
2.4 FWD 6,999,000 Rs. 
2.4 AWD 7,999,000 Rs. 
3.5 FWD 8,399,000 Rs.

They were announced after I made the vlog, What do you guys think? Should I get the Sorento or the Carnival (9.5 Million)? Paisay to hain nahein aglay saal kai leeyay sooch raha houn. 

Shot by Ahsan Ahmad 
Edited by Bilal Saagar & Mooroo

snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Ringtone sung by Aroob Khan ft. Riyaz Aly .


Stream the full song here :

Shehnai Omkar Dhumal

Featuring - Aroob Khan Ft. Riyaz Aly

Special Thanks : Yatin Kukreja
Dop - Shinda Singh

Art director Mr. blacc

Hairstylist - Harry

Still Photography - Shivam 
Line Producer - Kuldeep Production
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital 

Lyrics:

Ruseya Hoya Ae Ve Tu Ki Sajjna
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna,
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna,

Ruseya Hoya A Ve Tu Ki Sajna
Kall Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajna
Deve Na Jawab Ve Tu Meri Call Da
Main Rova Tenu Disda Hi Nai Sajjna

Sach-Sach Das Ve Kar Hun Bass Ve
Mere Naal Lad-Lad Thakda Hi Nai

Main Tenu Vaar-Vaar Kardi Aan Phone
Wajje Ringtone, Tu Phone Mera Chakda Hi Nai,

Vaar-Vaar Kardi Aan Phone
Wajje Ringtone, Tu Phone Mera Chakda Hi Nai.


Main Hi Kyun Manavaan Har Var Sohneya
Tu Vi Taan Galat Huna Ae,

Subah To Main Sham Tak Takkan Teri Rahwan,
Har Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae,
Har Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae, Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae.

Hoya Ae Bukhar Ve Din Ho Gaye Char Ve
Fer Vi Satauno Mainu Akkda Hi Nai,

Main Tainu Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai,
Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai.



Khore ki ki chlda a mind ch tere jdo Ld pve bolda e nyi
Mrji'an ajkl jyada krda gl dil wali Kholda e nyi
Ravauna a aroob nu 
Jooth bole khoob tu 
Riyaz Ali roop ehe jachda e nai

Main Tainu Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai,
Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai.

#Ringtone #AroobKhan #RiyazAly

snippet.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fiancé Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

For More Hindi Dubbed Movies :-
Chanakya Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RX4k1BQFS3c&t=110s
Damayanthi Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I_yhiZvEdUY&t=116s
Chalo (Nagashaurya) Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5CJhgYf-Hc&t=149s

It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik on her journey, fakeness, her relationship with Abhinav| Exclusive
snippet.description:
Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik in an exclusive interview with Telly Talk shares the feeling of the winning moment. She talks about her journey in the Bigg Boss 14 house where she was rejected at first but eventually reached the finale. Rubina shares her plans of using the prize money. She also talks about her husband Abhinav Shukla and her response to the people questioning them for being fake. She also reveals the reason why they decided to make the problems in their relationship public. Rubina also shares who she will be in contact with after the show. Watch the video to know more.

#RubinaDilaik #BiggBoss14 #BiggBoss14Winner

snippet.title: History Of Pakistan #56 | Gen Pervez Musharraf & Nawab Akbar Bugti of Balochistan | Faisal Warraich
snippet.description:

snippet.title: ‘Yeh humari pawri ho rahi hai’ कहकर Viral होने वाली लड़की कौन है? (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
सोशल मीडिया पर आजकल एक मीम ने काफ़ी धमाल मचाया हुआ है. इसमें एक लड़की अपने हाथ में कैमरा लिए हुए है जो पहले अपने पीछे खड़ी एक गाड़ी को दिखाती है, फिर अपने कुछ दोस्तों को दिखाती है और इसके साथ ही कुछ वाक्य बोलती है.  लड़की कहती है, "ये हमारी कार है, ये हम हैं और ये हमारी पॉरी (यानी पार्टी) हो रही है." अपने दोस्तों के साथ बनाई गई महज़ चार सेकेंड की इस आम वीडियो में जो लड़की है, वो देखते ही देखते वायरल हो गई है. उनके इस वीडियो पर लगातर मीम्स बन रहे हैं और भारत में एक संगीतकार ने उनके वीडियो को इस्तेमाल करते हुए एक 'मेशअप' गीत भी बना दिया है. 

स्टोरी: मंज़ाह अनवार, बीबीसी उर्दू 
आवाज़: मानसी दाश
वीडियो एडिटिंग: रुबाइयत बिस्वास

#PartyMeme PakistanMemeGirl 

BBC Indian Sportswoman of the Year: अपनी पसंदीदा खिलाड़ी को वोट करने के लिए क्लिक करें:  
https://bbc.in/3tIchvU

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

Likho Nooh Tum Panch Isme Ilahi
Farishtey Abhi BadBaa’n Khenchtey Hain

Pisar Mang Rahib Yeh Daite Rahaingain
Sakhi Hath Apna Kahan Khenchtey Hain

Qayamat Main Daikha Qayamat Ka Manzar
Muqasir Ki Mesum Zaba’n Khenchtey Hain

Yeh Sajdo’n Main Sher e Khuda Ki Kashish Hai
Makaa’n Sey Suwe La Makaa’n Khenchtey Hain

Yah Khaki  Bashar Farsh e Aza Bicha Kar
Zameen Ki Taraf Asmaan Khenchtey Hain

Nuseri Muqasir Rahai Apni Had Main
Woh Mola Ko Kyun Darmiyaan Khenchtey Hain

Takallum Khuda e Sukhan kay Kalam Say
Jabee’n e Imam e Zamaan Khenchtey Hain
